src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update LiquibaseProperties import to the new Spring Boot 3.2+ package structure.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.liquibase.LiquibaseProperties was removed in Spring Boot 3.2; using the old import causes a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update import path for JCacheManagerCustomizer to match Spring Boot 3 package structure.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.cache.JCacheManagerCustomizer does not exist in Spring Boot 3; it has been moved to org.springframework.boot.cache.autoconfigure.JCacheManagerCustomizer.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update import path for HibernatePropertiesCustomizer to match Spring Boot 3 package structure.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.orm.jpa.HibernatePropertiesCustomizer does not exist in Spring Boot 3; it has been moved to org.springframework.boot.hibernate.autoconfigure.HibernatePropertiesCustomizer.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Spring Boot import paths to reflect the package restructuring in Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The classes DataSourceProperties, LiquibaseDataSource, and LiquibaseProperties have been moved to new packages (org.springframework.boot.jdbc.autoconfigure and org.springframework.boot.liquibase.autoconfigure) in Spring Boot 3.x; using the old packages results in a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Profiles.of() with Environment.matchesProfiles() for profile checking.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Profiles.of() is deprecated in Spring Framework 6.x / Spring Boot 3.x; while it might still compile, it is removed or strongly discouraged, and matchesProfiles is the standard replacement.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace com.fasterxml.jackson imports with tools.jackson imports to align with the Jackson 2.18+ package restructuring.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The com.fasterxml.jackson.core and com.fasterxml.jackson.databind packages are removed or relocated in the new Jackson version used by the target framework, causing compilation errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the method signature to throw the new Jackson exception class instead of the legacy one.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: JsonProcessingException from com.fasterxml.jackson.core is no longer available; the method must declare the new JacksonException from tools.jackson.core to compile.
